evidenceBoundary.summary: This trace records observable repository work, files read or changed, implementation decisions, validation evidence, pivots, CI repair work and residual risks.

correctiveBranchBehaviour.reason: Earlier branches were created before the repository operating model was loaded correctly.

airtableSourceOfTruth.canonicalIdentifier: Airtable record id / Record ID field value
airtableSourceOfTruth.connectorLimitation: Airtable base was visible through the connector, but table/schema/record reads returned a 429 monthly API limit error. The concrete record IDs came from the user-provided Airtable screenshot.

planAdjustments: Server-side access enforcement happens before card display repair.
The card label uses user-facing Team language, not implementation labels.
Projects without a resolvable team are visible only to ResearchOps Core.
Malformed UserGroups values are treated as privacy-sensitive and filtered without logging raw values.
Start research project is gated in both the UI and POST /api/projects.
The dashboard fetches /api/projects/:id directly rather than searching all listed projects.
After screenshot review, GET project reads use Airtable rec... record IDs, not PID or LocalId.
D1 mirrors the active Airtable Projects set by rec... id with non-destructive active/inactive state.

initialFindings: public/js/projects-page.js hard-codes Home Office Biometrics as the project organisation fallback.
/api/projects listed projects without receiving scoped authentication context from the Worker route.
The project service mapped core project fields but not a canonical team identity.
UserGroups parsing could render malformed person-field or JSON fragments.
public/js/project-dashboard.js loaded all projects and searched client-side by ID.
public/pages/start/start-new-project.js posted to /api/projects and needed active team context server-side.
visual-walkthrough.operational-fixtures.mjs mocked project reads and needed to match the scoped API response shape.

server: Updated infra/cloudflare/src/service/index.js so project list, create, read and patch methods accept scoped authentication context.
Updated infra/cloudflare/src/worker.js so GET /api/projects, POST /api/projects, GET /api/projects/:id and PATCH /api/projects/:id resolve scoped authentication context.
Added infra/cloudflare/src/service/project-record-routes.js as the authoritative read path for Airtable Projects records using Airtable rec... record IDs.
Kept POST /api/projects and PATCH /api/projects/:id on the existing project service to minimise write-path scope.
Added non-destructive D1 active cache mirror keyed by Airtable rec... id through rops_projects_cache.
client: Updated public/js/projects-page.js to fetch with credentials, render team ownership from API data, remove the Home Office Biometrics card fallback, suppress identity-like user group fragments and hide Start research project until API capability is known.
Removed the browser-side /api/projects.csv fallback from public/js/projects-page.js so project listing remains behind the scoped API boundary.
Updated public/js/projects-page.js to prefer id, airtableId and recordId from the API rather than LocalId.
Updated public/js/project-dashboard.js to fetch /api/projects/:id directly with credentials and include credentials on project patch requests.
Updated public/pages/start/start-new-project.js so it submits to the configured API origin with credentials and no longer sends hard-coded org: Home Office Biometrics.
Updated public/pages/projects/index.html so the Start research project action is hidden by default until capability resolves.
testsAndFixtures: Updated tests/projects-route-contract.test.js to assert the five Airtable rec... project IDs from the screenshot.
Updated tests/projects-route-contract.test.js to reject PID-* ids and verify direct /api/projects/:recordId reads.
Restored tests/projects-page-route-state.test.js as a minimal required smoke test after stale route-state assertions were removed.
Updated tests/project-dashboard-route-state.test.js for the direct /api/projects/:id dashboard contract.
Updated visual-walkthrough.operational-fixtures.mjs with team identifiers, ResearchOps Core auth context and an ok/projects/canStartProject API response shape.
documentation: Updated RECENT_LEARNINGS.md with server-side access-control and visible role-consultation lessons.
Updated docs/agent-audit/reasoning/2026/05/14/projects-team-scoped-access-progress.md with the Airtable record ID correction, D1 active cache and current validation evidence.

accessControlDecisions: Project visibility is enforced server-side, not in the project card renderer.
ResearchOps Core members can see all projects for Research Operations oversight.
Non-Core users can see only projects matching their team memberships.
Projects without a resolvable team are visible only to ResearchOps Core.
Browser-side fallback to raw project CSV was removed because it could bypass server-side team filtering.
Project dashboard reads one project directly through /api/projects/:id and receives the same scoped access treatment.
The canonical project id for reads and links is the Airtable rec... record id. PID and LocalId are not accepted as project route identifiers.

plannedCommits.summary: Create trace Markdown, trace JSON and role consultation transcript before code changes.
Update project card, dashboard and start-project client behaviour.
Repair failing PR checks and sync machine-readable trace evidence.
Correct the project read contract to Airtable rec... record IDs and mirror the active set into D1.

risks.risk: Airtable project team schema is not yet explicit or may differ by environment.
risks.mitigation: Tolerate known field variants for reads; document field assumptions; do not silently invent migrations.

risks.risk: Project creation may fail if Airtable lacks configured team fields.
risks.mitigation: Return a clear configuration error and document required field configuration.

risks.risk: Start project gating only on the client would be insufficient.
risks.mitigation: Enforce permission server-side and mirror capability in the UI.

risks.risk: Malformed UserGroups values may contain personal data fragments.
risks.mitigation: Filter identity-like fragments and avoid logging raw values.

risks.risk: D1 active cache is maintained inside the read route and is best-effort.
risks.mitigation: Airtable remains source of truth. Cache failures do not block the authoritative Airtable response.

risks.risk: This trace-sync commit creates a new PR head after all checks were green on the previous head.
risks.mitigation: Recheck PR checks after the trace-sync commit completes.

repairs: Split the access-scoped import in worker.js so the existing auth-foundation route-state assertion still recognises the /api/me contract.
Added authErrorResponse handling in worker.js so scoped project auth failures return the resolver status and code.
Updated project-dashboard route-state expectations from list-and-pick to direct project read.
Updated projects route contract tests with authenticated request and D1 mock fixtures.
Extended the D1 mock to support both .bind().all() and direct .all() calls used by the scoped auth resolver.
Replaced PID-based project route fixtures with the five Airtable rec... IDs shown in the Airtable screenshot.
Restored the required projects-page-route-state test as a smoke test after stale source-string assertions blocked the corrected route.

rollback.rollbackRoute: Revert branch commits or close the PR unmerged. If deployed and problematic, roll back Worker and Pages deployments to the previous main deployment.

progress.event: Initial plan created before code changes.
Role consultation transcript created and linked into the controlling plan before implementation resumed.
Server routing and service signatures updated for scoped auth context.
Project service updated for team-scoped visibility, project creation permission, team-field normalisation and identity-fragment filtering.
Projects page, dashboard and start-project clients updated to use scoped API behaviour.
Browser-side CSV fallback removed after access-control pivot.
Route-state tests, project route contract tests and visual walkthrough fixtures updated.
PR check failures investigated and repaired.
Airtable screenshot showed the earlier green checks still proved the wrong PID-based contract.
Project read routes corrected to Airtable rec... record IDs, with the five current Airtable record IDs asserted in tests.
D1 active project cache added using non-destructive active/inactive state keyed by Airtable rec... id.
All observed checks were green on head 5a27cd386b9855458308e37278223256a604d433 before this JSON trace-sync commit.
